Witness statements	30

IMPORTANT NOTICES

(penal notice: not automatically included. if included, the order must be personally served unless the court dispenses with that requirement: fpr 2010, r 37(4)

Penal notice

IMPORTANT WARNING TO [NAME]

If you [NAME] of [ADDRESS] disobey [this order] / [paragraph[s] [insert paragraph number(s)] of this order] you may be held to be in contempt of court and may be imprisoned, fined or have your assets seized.

Child arrangements orders warnings

(where the court makes or varies a child arrangements order, it must attach the following notice: s 11i, ca 1989)
